plugins.name: flywheel
plugins.description: Flywheel work item management — orchestrate, plan, and execute tasks

plugins.name: co-dwerker
plugins.description: Structured daily development workflow for any GitHub repo. Supports repo mode (GitHub Issues) and project mode (GitHub Projects board). Standup, brainstorm, execute, standalone documentation, close, and session continuity. Optimized for Opus.

plugins.name: agent-eval-updates
plugins.description: High-autonomy tuning iteration for BTC Azure Function Agents in the btc_agent_evals project. Pulls CosmosDB evaluations since last round, filters pre-fix artifacts, analyzes prompt vs code fixes, implements in per-agent worktrees with local soak testing, and opens per-agent PRs. Four user gates only.
